name: TOEFL 준비 — 대학원 지원 (90→100+, Writing 약점, neutral)

conversation.user: Applying to grad school, need TOEFL 100+. Test in 2 months. Currently around 90. Writing section is weak. I can study 2 hours a day.

strategy: Writing 60% of study time: Integrated Writing 35% + Independent Writing 25%
Integrated Writing first — faster score gain than Independent (structure is learnable)
non-linear: 90→100+ = real proficiency required, not just test-taking tricks
daily: 1 essay + rubric self-scoring with sample comparison
warnings: mild risk note: Integrated Writing improves faster than Independent — prioritize Integrated first
non-linear: 90→100 requires real English proficiency improvement, not just strategy
Independent Writing requires argument depth development — daily practice non-negotiable

hardFailChecks: must NOT ask any questions — full information provided
must specify Writing split: Integrated vs Independent (not just 'work on Writing')
must include weekend full mock exam as structured element
must note Integrated Writing improves faster than Independent
must mention non-linear score improvement for all profiles
